SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.viewmodel

Class ScansGalleryViewModel

java.lang.Object
androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.viewmodel.ScansGalleryViewModel
public class ScansGalleryViewModel extends androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
ViewModel providing filtered/sorted gallery items for the saved scans screen.

    • getGalleryItems

      public androidx.lifecycle.LiveData<List<ScanGalleryItem>> getGalleryItems()
      Returns:
      Current gallery list after user filters and sorting are applied.
